texto: There ought not be two histories, one of political and moral action and one of political and moral theorizing, because there were not two pasts, one populated only by actions, the other only by theories. Every action is the bearer and expression of more or less theory-laden beliefs and concepts; every piece of theorizing and every expression of belief is a politcal and moral action.
explicacao: Citação de Alasdair McIntyre sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There ought not be two histories, one of political and moral action and one of political and mora…” articula reflexao, ethics, theory em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como theory.
